subject: FW: Brillo Decoration
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Daniel Estes [mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, November 21, 2007 5:55 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Cc: Rich Kahn; daschoettle@yahoo.com; Helena Maybank; Lesley Groff
Subject: Brillo Decoration



Sarah,

Attached please find  the following documents:

 

*         An image document entitled "Brillo Decoration" with images of
all items for the decoration of the house in Palm Beach

*         A spread sheet entitled "Brillo Budget" with pricing and
contact info for all of the items listed in the image document

*         Two floor plans entitled "Brillo Floor Plan" that show where
the furniture is to be placed in the house

*         And a letter entitled " Brillo letter" with some general
information about all of this.

 

As some of these files are quite large, hard copies of all of this are
being sent to the house on 71st Street as well as to the office on
Madison.  Have a Happy Thanksgiving!

 

Daniel Estes

destes@zeffdesign.com <mailto:destes@zeffdesign.com> 

 

zeffdesign

 

515 West 20th St, 4W

New York,  NY  10011

 

P. 212.580.7090 x206

F. 212.580.7181

www.zeffdesign.com
